subject: Ops note: falcon deployment schedule for Christchurch | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-4669
body: Here is a progress summary for the falcon plan in Christchurch. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-4669. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
